MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-04-2020 Continued To May-10-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Defendant City And County Of San Francisco'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint
Off Calendar Aug-11-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Defendant City and County of San Francisco's motion for leave to file cross-complaint is granted. AT&T has not shown that it would be prejudiced by allowing the City to file the cross-complaint, nor that the City has unduly delayed in seeking leave. It would further judicial economy and would be in the interest of justice for all related issues to be resolved in the same action. (Code Civ. Proc. Sec 428.50.)

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)
